body.title: Design-only — scope per-stage confidence emission + gating into concrete tickets
body.result: design doc lab/design_docs/confidence_gated_depth.md — per-stage inventory of all 9 cognitive stages + 9 proposed per-stage tickets for Akien review. Recognize stage flagged mature (T-gist-before-retrieve); reason stage flagged HARD (prefer divergence-from-shadow over self-report). Commit 77b725ce.
body.description:
The 9-stage operational model (attend → predict → recognize → retrieve → reason → select → articulate → reflect → learn) locked in during the design conversation calls for each stage to emit a confidence score, and the next stage to be gated on whether that confidence exceeds a threshold (high → short-circuit, low → proceed to full processing). This is a principle, not a single file change — it touches every cognitive stage. Before building, need a design pass that inventories each stage's current confidence emission (if any), identifies where it's missing, and scopes the work into per-stage tickets.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step. Output is a design doc at `lab/design_docs/confidence_gated_depth.md` listing per-stage gaps and proposed per-stage tickets.
**Design rules:** docs-in-code (the output IS the doc); no other checks apply — this is a design ticket, not a build ticket.
**Scope boundary:** IN: inventory each stage's confidence emission (current state); identify missing emissions; propose per-stage tickets for the gaps; document threshold-tuning approach. OUT: actual implementation (each per-stage ticket); threshold values (belongs in the implementation tickets).
**Test plan:** no tests — design ticket. Output is a markdown doc reviewed by Akien; once approved, spawns concrete per-stage tickets that DO have test plans.
